<div id="welcome-splash" class="welcome-splash" hidden aria-hidden="true">
  <div class="welcome-splash__backdrop"></div>
  <div class="welcome-splash__burst" aria-label="Social profiles">
    <a href="https://www.github.com/matdknu" class="welcome-social" style="--i:0" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="GitHub"><i class="bi bi-github" aria-hidden="true"></i></a>
    <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=matdknu" class="welcome-social" style="--i:1" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="Google Scholar"><span class="welcome-social__label">GS</span></a>
    <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/deneken/" class="welcome-social" style="--i:2" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="LinkedIn"><i class="bi bi-linkedin" aria-hidden="true"></i></a>
    <a href="https://orcid.org" class="welcome-social" style="--i:3" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="ORCID"><span class="welcome-social__label">ID</span></a>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  if (sessionStorage.getItem("welcome-seen")) return;
  if (window.matchMedia("(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)").matches) {
    sessionStorage.setItem("welcome-seen", "1");
    return;
  }

  var splash = document.getElementById("welcome-splash");
  if (!splash) return;

  splash.hidden = false;
  splash.setAttribute("aria-hidden", "false");
  document.body.classList.add("welcome-active");

  requestAnimationFrame(function () {
    splash.classList.add("is-visible");
  });

  window.setTimeout(function () {
    splash.classList.add("is-exiting");
  }, 1000);

  window.setTimeout(function () {
    splash.classList.remove("is-visible", "is-exiting");
    splash.hidden = true;
    splash.setAttribute("aria-hidden", "true");
    document.body.classList.remove("welcome-active");
    sessionStorage.setItem("welcome-seen", "1");
  }, 1500);
});
</script>
